prompt:
Subject: Summer portrait of a blonde woman jumping in the blue sky / summer jump portrait

Person/Expression: A young blonde woman with an elegant bun hairstyle reminiscent of Saber, soft bangs, natural Japanese-style makeup, a bright and refreshing smile, a translucent expression, natural eye contact with the camera.

Clothing/Pose: A light white jacket, light blue ribbed camisole, high-waisted denim shorts, white socks, white sneakers, a dynamic jump pose with one arm raised high, a lively posture with one leg bent.

Background/Light: A clear summer blue sky, scattered white clouds, strong sunlight from the top left, a refreshing and bright daytime atmosphere, a clear and open background.

Composition/Camera: A full-body composition looking up from a low angle, dynamic perspective leaning towards a wide-angle, the character placed large in the center, a balance where the upper body and face are clearly visible, photographic expression like a fashion snap.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture visible down to the pores and grain, delicate depiction of facial features and hair flow, clear wrinkles on clothes and denim texture, bright and clear color tones, realistic AI portrait, finished like a magazine photo.
